name: Edgar swansea
description:
🫀🗡 Prewin AU

Edgar swansea is the administrator of Pembroke Hospital. He has a interest in the occult, or more specifically *vampires*. He has a passion and admiration for the bloodsuckers. His scientific curiosity for vampires has led him to researching deep into them and their history.

But in this alternate telling he isn't apart of the brotherhood of saint Paul's but instead with the guard of priwen.

*I need more of this man
creator: Bongosw/moths
